place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Sea-View Retreat Residence, Bophut, Koh Samui
note: Fully staffed · chef on request · + tax & service
blurb: An elegant hillside residence within a managed retreat in the Bophut hills, its wood-lined pavilions opening to a long infinity pool and sweeping views over the Gulf. Vaulted ceilings, sea-facing bedrooms and a master with a terrazzo bathtub, with access to the retreat’s shared facilities and a fully-staffed service. Optional private chef.
detail:
Set high in the Bophut hills within a managed retreat, this elegant residence makes the most of its elevated position, its wood-lined pavilions opening through full-height glass to a long infinity pool and sweeping views across the Gulf and the islands beyond.

The living and dining pavilion sits beneath a high, vaulted timber ceiling, with an open kitchen and breakfast bar and generous terraces that blur the line between inside and out. Sea-facing bedrooms are finished in natural materials and warm timber, each with an en-suite bathroom; the master suite adds a terrazzo bathtub positioned to the ocean view.

Guests enjoy a fully-staffed service alongside access to the wider retreat’s shared facilities — a gym, dining and wellness amenities — with an optional private chef available to prepare meals throughout the day. A short drive from Bophut village, Fisherman’s Village and Maenam Beach.
